# Weinrich Minerals – Popular and Rare Minerals for Sale

Weinrich Minerals has a [large selection of mineral specimens](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index "Large selection of mineral specimens for sale") in various colors, sizes, and price ranges. Our online mineral store has something for everyone, from personal collectors to museums. Whether you’re looking for [a rare mineral](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?quality%5B%5D=best "Rare minerals for sale") or want a new piece to add to your collection, we have just the mineral you. If you're interested in starting your collection, read our helpful [tips on starting your own mineral collection](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/mineral-collecting-tips.php "Tips on starting your own mineral collection"). Our inventory is [regularly updated](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?show_new=1&quality%5B%5D=best&quality%5B%5D=general&quality%5B%5D=discounted "Regularly updated inventory"), so check back often to see what’s in stock. Follow us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/weinrichmineralsinc/ "Facebook Page") or [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/weinrich_minerals_inc/ "Instagram Page") for the latest minerals and additions to our store. Join our mailing list for special offers and sales.

Shop for popular and rare minerals such as [azurite](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=112&locality=&ex= "Azurite for sale"), ## Buy Minerals and Crystals from Around the World

You can buy minerals sourced from various countries including [Brazil](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Brazil&ex= "Buy minerals from Brazil"), [China](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=china&ex= "Buy minerals from China"), [France](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=France&ex= "Buy minerals from France"), [Italy](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Italy&ex= "Buy minerals from Italy"), [Kosovo](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Kosovo&ex= "Buy minerals from Kosovo"), [Mexico](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Mexico&ex= "Buy minerals from Mexico"), [Morocco](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Morocco&ex= "Buy minerals from Morocco"), [Namibia](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Namibia&ex= "Buy minerals from Namibia"), [Peru](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Peru&ex= "Buy minerals from Peru"), [Portugal](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Portugal&ex= "Buy minerals from Portugal"), [Republic of Congo](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Republic+of+Congo&ex= "Buy minerals from Republic of Congo"). [Madagascar](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Madagascar&ex= "Buy minerals from Madagascar"), [Romania](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Romania&ex= "Buy minerals from Romania"), [Russia](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Russia&ex= "Buy minerals from Russia"), [Spain](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Spain&ex= "Buy minerals from Spain"), [Switzerland](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Switzerland&ex= "Buy minerals from Switzerland"), and [Vietnam](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/product/shop/index?price_low=&price_high=&specimen_number=&name=&species=&locality=Vietnam&ex= "Buy minerals from Vietnam").

## Mineral Auctions

[Bid on the finest mineral specimens](http://auction.danweinrich.com/ "Mineral auctions"), both contemporary and classics, for both collectors and curators. The auction will close every Tuesday evening at 7 p.m. Eastern Standard Time. New specimens are usually posted immediately after the close of the previous auction.

## We Buy Collections and Single Important Specimens

Interested in selling your mineral collection or single important specimens? [Contact us for an estimate](https://www.weinrichmineralsinc.com/contact.php "Contact Weinrich Minerals for an estimate") for your collection.
